name: gmail-mcp
description: Multi-account Gmail MCP server — read, send, search, and manage email across several Gmail accounts. Every tool takes an `account` alias so you choose which mailbox to act on.

config_dir.title: Config directory
config_dir.description: Directory holding credentials.json and the accounts/ folder (default: ~/.gmail-mcp). Before this bundle is useful you must: (1) create a Google OAuth "Desktop app" client, enable the Gmail API, and save the downloaded credentials.json into this directory; (2) run `gmail-mcp auth add <alias>` from a terminal once per account. See the project README for full setup.
